name: io.github.popoverai/browser-automation
description: MCP server for AI browser automation. Fork of @browserbasehq/mcp-server-browserbase with LOCAL mode default.

environment_variables.description: Your Browserbase API key (only for cloud mode)
environment_variables.name: BROWSERBASE_API_KEY

environment_variables.description: Your Browserbase Project ID (only for cloud mode)
environment_variables.name: BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID

environment_variables.description: Your Gemini API key (for Stagehand AI features)
environment_variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environment_variables.description: ngrok auth token for localhost tunneling (only for cloud mode)
environment_variables.name: NGROK_AUTHTOKEN
